name: Aisha Patel
about: 6 years in luxury women's ready-to-wear at Saks and Neiman Marcus. Retailers praise her ability to build long-term client relationships. Frequently requested for trunk shows and VIP events.
interviewTranscript: I've worked for Nordstrom and Bloomingdale's—in totality about two years of my career has been in retail. When I reflect back on that experience, one of the things that stands out the most is just the memories of being able to satisfy my customers and exceed their expectations. I remember a time where one of my customers was in need of a dress for an event. She fell in love with it and we didn't have it on the floor, but I saw it was available at a different location. I contacted the store, had that dress shipped, stayed in contact with the customer, and was able to close the sale. Relationship building when it comes to customer service is extremely important to me.
